title: SJB to boycott Parliament from today
body_lines: Samagi Jana Balawegaya (SJB) has decided to boycott Parliament from today, Party General Secretary Ranjith Madduma Bandara said.

"We don't want to waste our time coming to Parliament and listen to the government's warning that coming days and weeks are going to get tough and other related stories. Also the government hasn't given any proper assurance on constitutional reforms," he further added. (Yohan Perera and Ajith Siriwardana)
